subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared residential street
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears the gentle rise, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the residential street, lifting over a gentle rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A flat N.American suburban residential street at night, a quiet two-lane road with no central divider, lined by parked cars, mature autumn trees shedding leaves, and modest homes with a few lit windows. Cool streetlight pools fall at intervals on dry asphalt with worn lane markings. The street runs level then lifts over a gentle rise ahead, a crest that briefly hides then reveals the oncoming lane. Beyond the streetlights the neighborhood fades into dim dark with scattered porch lamps.

lighting.conditions: Clear autumn night lit by cool streetlight pools; dry roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare ahead and slightly left between streetlight pools
lighting.shadows: Layered tree-branch shadows from streetlights stretching across dry asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool streetlight pools alternate with dark between mature trees; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming bloom, lens-flare starbursts, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Quiet residential street to a gentle rise near mid-frame, oncoming glare dominating upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool night blue and streetlight grey-white over dry asphalt with warm porch accents, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, quiet, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious
aesthetics.patterns: Parked cars, tree-branch shadows, and dashed lane markings sliding past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the residential street, subtle bob over the gentle rise, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and lane markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a suburban residential street

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the suburban residential street at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past a gentle rise
Vehicle lifts over the gentle rise; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, street becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the residential street at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing past a gentle rise
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear between streetlight pools
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Lifting over the gentle rise as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, street regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a quiet suburban residential street at night, ego headlights and streetlight pools over worn markings past parked cars while a faint glow appears past a gentle rise. By 0:01 the vehicle lifts over the rise and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, lens-flare starbursts, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the street reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on dry asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Quiet autumn-night stillness, rustling leaves, a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing; no music or speech.
